name: ai-executive-os-backend
description: npm scripts wrap Python dev commands (like frontend package.json). Requires .venv — run npm run setup once.

scripts.setup: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt && npm install
scripts.predev: npm run db:check && npm run db:migrate
scripts.dev: npm run predev && concurrently -k -n api,worker -c blue,magenta "npm run api" "npm run worker"
scripts.dev:api: npm run predev && npm run api
scripts.bootstrap: npm run deps:docker && npm run setup && npm run db:migrate
